meta.description: Relic definitions for the fragment forging system (TI4 PoK-inspired)

mandalorian-war-horn.name: Mandalorian War Horn
mandalorian-war-horn.description: All allies gain +1 attack die for the entire mission.
mandalorian-war-horn.lore: Forged in the fires of Mandalore's ancient wars, this horn's blast fills allies with righteous fury.

beskar-shield-emitter.name: Beskar Shield Emitter
beskar-shield-emitter.description: The assigned hero gains +1 defense die permanently.
beskar-shield-emitter.lore: A personal shield generator reinforced with beskar alloy. Virtually indestructible.

cortosis-weave-armor.name: Cortosis Weave Armor
cortosis-weave-armor.description: The assigned hero gains +2 soak permanently.
cortosis-weave-armor.lore: Armor woven with cortosis fibers, capable of resisting even lightsaber strikes.

bacta-infuser.name: Bacta Infuser
bacta-infuser.description: One-time use: heal all heroes for 5 wounds.
bacta-infuser.lore: A compact but potent bacta delivery system, enough to stabilize an entire squad.

tactical-uplink.name: Tactical Uplink
tactical-uplink.description: Gain +2 command tokens per round for one mission.
tactical-uplink.lore: Military-grade comm array providing real-time battlefield coordination across all units.

imperial-jammer.name: Imperial Signal Jammer
imperial-jammer.description: Reduce Imperial threat per round by 2 for one mission.
imperial-jammer.lore: Scrambles Imperial comm frequencies, delaying reinforcement coordination.

kyber-focusing-lens.name: Kyber Focusing Lens
kyber-focusing-lens.description: Allows 3 free attack rerolls across the mission.
kyber-focusing-lens.lore: A kyber crystal ground into a perfect lens, channeling the Force to guide one's aim.

force-nexus-shard.name: Force Nexus Shard
force-nexus-shard.description: The assigned hero gains +1 attack die permanently.
force-nexus-shard.lore: A shard from a Force vergence, pulsing with raw power that enhances all actions.

holocron-of-strategy.name: Holocron of Strategy
holocron-of-strategy.description: Gain 1.5x XP from the next mission.
holocron-of-strategy.lore: A Jedi holocron containing tactical wisdom that accelerates learning.

pathfinder-beacon.name: Pathfinder Beacon
pathfinder-beacon.description: Increases chance of finding relic fragments from exploration by 25%.
pathfinder-beacon.lore: An ancient scanner tuned to detect artifacts of significance.

intel-network-key.name: Intel Network Key
intel-network-key.description: The assigned hero gains +1 defense die permanently.
intel-network-key.lore: Access to a covert intelligence network that provides advance warning of threats.

phrik-plating.name: Phrik Alloy Plating
phrik-plating.description: The assigned hero gains +1 soak permanently.
phrik-plating.lore: Phrik alloy plating, lightsaber-resistant and nearly weightless.
